turns.user: hãy tìm cho tôi thông tin về ca sĩ sơn tùng mtp
turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số thông tin mới nhất về ca sĩ Sơn Tùng M-TP:

1. **Sơn Tùng M-TP và Tyga kỷ niệm di sản Việt Nam với bài hát "Come My Way"**:
   - Sơn Tùng M-TP đã hợp tác với nghệ sĩ rap người Mỹ Tyga trong bài hát mới mang tên "Come My Way", được phát hành trên tất cả các nền tảng phát trực tuyến vào cuối tuần qua. Bài hát này không chỉ thể hiện sự kết hợp giữa âm nhạc Việt Nam và hip-hop Mỹ mà còn mang ý nghĩa sâu sắc về di sản văn hóa. Tyga chia sẻ rằng việc làm việc với Sơn Tùng M-TP là một cơ hội để anh kết nối lại với phần di sản của mình. 
   - [Đọc thêm trên Yahoo News](https://ca.news.yahoo.com/n-t-ng-m-tp-075022394.html)

2. **Bài viết trên Forbes về sự hợp tác của Sơn Tùng M-TP và Tyga**:
   - Bài viết này cũng nhấn mạnh sự kết nối văn hóa trong bài hát "Come My Way", với hình ảnh Sơn Tùng M-TP đứng trên một con chim Lạc bằng đồng, biểu tượng của Việt Nam, trong bối cảnh đường phố Los Angeles.
   - [Đọc thêm trên Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/laurasirikul/2026/06/01/sn-tng-m-tp-and-tyga-celebrate-vietnamese-heritage-with-come-my-way/)

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin chi tiết hoặc có câu hỏi khác, hãy cho tôi biết!

items.title: Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’ - Yahoo News Canada
items.summary: # Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’. Vietnamese superstar, Sơn Tùng M-TP, is crossing over with Western artists, teaming up with American rap artist Tyga on their new single, “Come My Way,” released this past weekend on all streaming platforms. The collaboration feels like a perfect fit, as it bridges Sơn Tùng M-TP’s global expansion and American hip-hop, especially with Tyga’s mixed Vietnamese heritage, giving the song a deeper connection to the music and culture. “Working with Sơn Tùng M-TP on this record felt natural because it gave me a chance to reconnect with a side of my heritage that’s always been part of me,” says Tyga. “Growing up half-Vietnamese, I’ve always had pride in that identity, and being able to celebrate it through music on a global record like this just felt right. Sơn Tùng M-TP is standing on a bronze Chim Lạc, an ancient bird of Vietnam, as it floats through the streets of Downtown Los Angeles.

items.title: Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’ - Forbes
items.summary: # Sơn Tùng M-TP And Tyga Celebrate Vietnamese Heritage With ‘Come My Way’. Vietnamese superstar, Sơn Tùng M-TP, is crossing over with Western artists, teaming up with American rap artist Tyga on their new single, “Come My Way,” released this past weekend on all streaming platforms. The collaboration feels like a perfect fit, as it bridges Sơn Tùng M-TP’s global expansion and American hip-hop, especially with Tyga’s mixed Vietnamese heritage, giving the song a deeper connection to the music and culture. “Working with Sơn Tùng M-TP on this record felt natural because it gave me a chance to reconnect with a side of my heritage that’s always been part of me,” says Tyga. Sơn Tùng M-TP is standing on a bronze Chim Lạc, an ancient bird of Vietnam, as it floats through the streets of Downtown Los Angeles. Sơn Tùng M-TP x TYGA’s “Come My Way” is out now on all streaming platforms.

items.title: BTS Wins Artist of the Year at American Music Awards: Complete Winners List - Variety Australia
items.summary: # BTS Wins Artist of the Year at American Music Awards, as Katseye, Sombr, ‘Golden’ Also Score Top Honors: Complete Winners List. Despite missing out in the new artist category, Sombr did not go home empty-handed, following his performance on the show with trips to the podium to pick up awards for Best Rock/Alternative Song, for “Back to Friends,” and Best Rock/Alternative Album, for “I Barely Know Her.”. The fervor for “KPop Demon Hunters” did not go unrewarded, as “Golden” and its singers EJAE, Audrey Nuna and Rei Ami picked up Song of the Year. So Album of the Year was one of the categories not given out on-air; it went to Sabrina Carpenter for “Man’s Best Friend,” one of three awards in all that were revealed as going to her after the broadcast was over. Artist of the Year: BTS. Song of the Year: The Singing Voices of HUNTR/X: EJAE, Audrey Nuna, Rei Ami – “Golden”.

items.title: Jesse McCartney to perform at senior prom in Bucks County - CBS News
items.summary: * Send Us a News Tip. # Jesse McCartney to perform at senior prom in Bucks County. 2000s pop singer Jesse McCartney will perform at the senior prom at Pennsbury High School in Fairless Hills, Bucks County this weekend, continuing a tradition of a major headliner taking the stage at what is called "The Best Prom in America.".

items.title: Megan Moroney Performs 'Wonder' at Her Best Friend Natalie's Wedding: 'This Might Be the Most Meaningful Time I Play It' - AOL.com
items.summary: # Megan Moroney Performs 'Wonder' at Her Best Friend Natalie's Wedding: 'This Might Be the Most Meaningful Time I Play It'. * Megan Moroney performed at her best friend Natalie King's wedding. * Moroney released "Wonder" in 2021. The country star performed the first song she ever released at her BFF Natalie King's wedding to Alex Harp on Saturday, May 23, in Turks and Caicos. Moroney, 28, who was designated the influencer's maid of honor, shared footage of the performance of her song "Wonder" on TikTok. During her set, where she sported a yellow chiffon dress with her hair in an updo, the "6 Months Later" artist told guests that the song was originally written for King, 28, years before. "I've played this song a lot, but I think that this might be the most meaningful time that I play it," said Moroney. "For those of you who don't know, the first song I ever released was a song written for Natalie.
